name: toastmaster-timer
description: Monorepo: Zoom app (apps/zoom-app) and marketing + web app (apps/web)

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build --prefix apps/zoom-app && npm run combine:dist
scripts.combine:dist: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r apps/web/dist/. dist/ && mkdir -p dist/zoom && cp -r apps/zoom-app/dist/. dist/zoom/
